    Export billing history
DOWNLOAD PDFs Download All

Need help with this page?

I'm registered for the Equal Payment Plan. How does this impact the amounts shown in my billing history?
The amounts shown in your billing history reflect your payment plan, not the amounts associated with your consumption. Please refer to your latest bill to see the difference between your consumption and payment plan amounts.

How can I get more information about my bill?
We want to make sure your natural gas or propane bill is clear and makes sense to you. Since there’s more to your bill than the amount due, we’ve created a sample bill that explains the different items that could appear on your bill. View a sample bill now.

How do I download my billing history?
You can download your billing history on the Export billing information page. Billing data can be exported as either a TXT (tab-separated text) or CSV (comma-separated values) file. These file formats can be opened in most spreadsheet programs or text editors, such as Microsoft Excel or Google Docs.

How can I obtain my billing history from more than 24 months ago?
If more than 24 months of information is available for your account, you can select a custom date range using the calendar on the  Export billing information page.

I paid my last bill, but my account is still showing a balance. What do I do?
Processing time is required for all online payments, pre-authorized payments and payments made at a financial institution, and even longer for payments made by cheque.

If more than five business days have passed since you made your payment, and you're concerned it wasn't received or accurately processed, contact customer service: natural gas / electricity.

1-888-224-2710
7 a.m. to 8 p.m.
1-866-436-7847
7 a.m. to 7 p.m.
